description: Tests if an outcome contains a card of a specified suit. Used as a predicate inside event() with card sample spaces. Accepts suit names (hearts, spades, diamonds, clubs) or Unicode suit symbols.

arguments.name: suitName
arguments.description: Suit name: hearts, spades, diamonds, or clubs

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards())
E = event(S, suit(hearts), fc(red))

S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), cards())
E = event(S, suit(spades), fc(navy))
